Fix Bluetooth pairing race conditions

Defer trust until pairing succeeds and serialize Bluetooth operations to avoid agent registration conflicts.

Add data-driven tutorial system

Tutorials are stored in workloads.json (not hardcoded), making them
user-editable and extensible.

Data model:
- Add 'tutorial' field (Option<String>) to Workload struct
- Add Tutorial struct and 'tutorials' vec to WorkloadRegistry
- Both use #[serde(default)] for backward compat with existing files

Content (11 tutorials total):
- General: Leader Key, Getting Started
- Per-workload: LSP, DAP, TreeView, Tabs, Telescope, Treesitter,
  OmniSharp (C#), Node (TS/JS), Python

CLI: pnm tutorial [topic]
- No args lists all topics
- Supports workload aliases (e.g. pnm tutorial py)

TUI:
- 't' on instance list opens tutorial browser
- 't' on edit features shows tutorial for highlighted workload
- Scrollable tutorial viewer (j/k, d/u, g/G)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: fix duplicate key bug and modularize shared code

- Fix duplicate React key error in HeroAnimation by adding stable
  element ID tracking (ids[]) to SortStep. Merge sort and insertion
  sort create temporary duplicate values in intermediate array states,
  which caused the valueToId map to return the same key for two
  positions. Each sorting algorithm now maintains a parallel ids array
  that tracks element identity through swaps, shifts, and copies.

- Extract shared color palette into app/lib/colors.ts, replacing 5
  independent color constant declarations across components.

- Extract generateArray and barColor into app/lib/sortingUtils.ts,
  removing duplicates from HeroAnimation and SortingVisualizer.

- Remove the fragile valueToId ref pattern from both HeroAnimation
  and SortingVisualizer in favor of step.ids[pos].

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

[loganalyzer] Ignore link-training status query errors during port transitions (#23200)

SAI cannot read link-training failure/rx status registers while the port
serdes is mid-transition (admin toggle). This causes transient ERR logs
from getPortLinkTrainingFailure and getPortLinkTrainingRxStatus in
orchagent that are harmless and do not indicate a real problem.

Once the port stabilizes (up or down), the queries succeed via the
periodic poller. Add both error patterns to the common ignore list.

Signed-off-by: Dashuai Zhang <dashuaizhang@microsoft.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix test_masked_services.py test when golden config is presented (#23183)

What is the motivation for this PR?
Some interfaces depend on physical-layer attributes in golden_config_db.json (e.g., link-training) to come up. Previously config_reload was called without override_config=True, so these settings were lost during minigraph load. This worked before but breaks on newer platforms that require these settings.

How did you do it?
Check if /etc/sonic/golden_config_db.json exists on the DUT. If yes, call config_reload with override_config=True; otherwise call without override to avoid failure.

How did you verify/test it?
Verified on physical testbed. Interfaces requiring link-training come up correctly when golden config is present.

Any platform specific information?
N/A

Signed-off-by: Dashuai Zhang <dashuaizhang@microsoft.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add admin panel pages: chat, email, invoices, notifications

- admin/chat.php: Chat dashboard with room list, message view, new chat modal
- admin/email_dashboard.php: Compose & send email to individual/role/all users
- admin/email_templates.php: Full CRUD for email templates with modal add/edit, delete confirmation, variable reference
- admin/email_sent.php: Paginated email log viewer
- admin/invoices.php: Invoice list with status filter, summary cards, search, delete modal
- admin/invoice_create.php: Create invoice with dynamic line items, auto-calc totals, project/client selectors
- admin/invoice_edit.php: Edit existing invoice with pre-filled data and line items
- admin/invoice_view.php: Printable invoice view with payment history, mark paid/sent/cancel actions, email client
- admin/notifications.php: View/mark-read/delete notifications with pagination

All pages use h() for output escaping, prepared statements, and CSRF tokens on POST forms.

Initial commit: PCSX2 launcher, keyboard input, RL scaffolding

- main.py: launches PCSX2 with -nogui -batch, loads savestates/rocm-racer-nfsu2-highway.p2s
- memory_readers/keyboard_controller.py: rootless xdotool-based keypress injection
  targeting PCSX2 window by PID; used for test loop (K = Cross/accelerate)
- memory_readers/virtual_gamepad.py: uinput DualShock2 virtual gamepad with full
  SDL3 game controller mapping (reserved for analog RL agent)
- memory_readers/nfsu2_memory.py: /proc/pid/mem telemetry reader scaffold (offsets TBD)
- environments/pcsx2_env.py: Gymnasium wrapper scaffold with PPO-ready reward function
- agents/ppo_agent.py, sac_agent.py: placeholder stubs
- docs/: summary, telemetry memory map, SDL3 controller integration research,
  implementation notes for human setup steps
- memcards/rocm-racer.ps2: pre-built PCSX2 memory card with 100% NFSU2 save
- savestates/rocm-racer-nfsu2-highway.p2s: highway loop training anchor save state
- requirements.txt: Python dependencies (PyTorch ROCm must be installed manually)

commit.message:
docs(paper): §7.3 factual corrections + §7.8 strengthened argument

§7.3 ForgeCraft case study:
- Version: v0.5.1 → 1.0.0 (released March 2026)
- Tests: 307 → 1127 (current)
- Distribution: npm + MCP client config (removed Homebrew/Snap/Chocolatey)
- Added open-source monetisation model (consulting, no subscription fee)

§7.8 Meta-Application:
- Added opening paragraph explicitly naming which cases used v0.5.1 vs what AX built
- Cycle expanded to 8 steps; step 1 now makes self-referential nature explicit
  (ForgeCraft is simultaneously specifier and subject of specification)
- Self-Applicability closing: added Completeness Law paragraph
  (S_realised = 1.0 at AX ceiling; law is self-consistent, not just directional)

Change 1 (version → 1.1) already applied in prior session.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Add KycAmlOnboardingModels.cs with state machine enums, core records, DTOs

- Add KycAmlOnboardingCaseService with fail-closed provider handling,
  idempotency, reviewer action state machine, evidence summary

- Register service in Program.cs with Swagger schema ID prefix
- Add 63 unit tests covering all paths, concurrency, schema contracts

Update .github/workflows/ci.yml

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(dx): scoring script bug fixes + re-run against all 6 pilot conditions

Fixes applied:
1. grep -> Node.js fs scan (cross-platform, no shell grep dependency)
2. --passWithNoTests removed; test count checked explicitly (0 tests = fail)
3. Coverage parsed from jest --coverage output; threshold 60% on feature file
4. rm -rf -> fs.rmSync(recursive) (cross-platform cleanup)
5. git clone --depth 1 -> --depth 20 (commit history check sees real history)
6. Bounded: checks new feature route only (digest.ts / activity.ts), not all routes

Re-run results (corrected gradient):
  naive:      1/7 automatable (scaffold commit artifact; real forks expected 0)
  competent:  3/7
  gs:         7/7 (perfect on all automatable checks)

GS achieves ceiling on automatable checks. Composable +3 (live server) is the
only remaining gap before April session.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(ui): include seed and config in exported game log

Log header now shows seed, player count, territory
count, map shape, speed, and enabled options. Player
list includes personality types for AI players.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(dx): add self-administered pilot results — baseline scores for April experiment

Six conditions piloted across both workshop repos:
- base-naive / kanban-naive: 0/14, Prisma in all routes, no tests
- base-competent / kanban-competent: 2-3/14, tests passing, no architecture
- base-gs / kanban-gs: 6-8/14, service layer, CLAUDE.md, ADRs, passing tests

Scoring script issues found (4 bugs, 2 calibration issues):
- Bounded check is a false positive on Windows (grep unavailable)
- Verifiable false positive when 0 tests + --passWithNoTests flag
- Coverage check not enforced in automation
- git --depth 1 makes commit format check unreliable

Rubric calibration: Bounded check fails for GS because pre-existing scaffold
routes carry Prisma. New feature routes (digest.ts, activity.ts) are clean.
Recommendation: check Bounded on new/changed files only.

All implementations in experiments/dx/pilot/. Results in results.md.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs(paper): add §7.8 Meta-Application — autonomous specification evolution

New section covering:
- AX experiment as simultaneous ForgeCraft development mechanism
- close_cycle audit loop: AI identifies gap, AI encodes fix, human validates
- Human role as trigger/validator, not author (git history verifiable)
- Eventually convergent (not monotone) — v4 regression explained as gap interaction
- F3 dependency rebuttal: ForgeCraft 1.0 emerged from AX, not prior to it
- Self-applicability as strongest implication: pragmatic tier governs its own instrument

Cross-references: §4.2 (pragmatic tier), §7.7 (F3 threat), §9.1 (agentic self-refinement), §10 (community ratchet)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs(paper): tighten F2/F4 -- formula as proposed model, non-software claims as hypotheses

F2: Added '(proposed model; analytically derived, N=3 directional support —
DX iteration-count data will provide first empirical validation)' parenthetical
at the §9.4 formula introduction. No formula changes — framing only.

F4: Changed 'the same principle governs any domain' to 'The same structural
argument applies — as an untested hypothesis — to any domain' (§10). Added
explicit framing sentence before the Convergent Principle examples:
'The following are structural analogies — the argument that the same principle
should apply, not evidence that it does.' Updated declarative language in the
medical/surgical/autonomous-vehicle paragraph to conditional ('would carry',
'would be', 'would operate', 'would approach', 'would be a surface', 'may
follow') per external reviewer note.

and (17) in the v1.1 Changes from v1.0 section.

commit.message:
Add complete admin panel for Softandpix website

- Shared includes: auth.php (session/CSRF/auth helpers), header.php (dark sidebar layout), footer.php
- Login/logout with password_verify() and session_regenerate_id()
- Dashboard (index.php) with stats cards and recent messages
- Hero, About: single-record editors with image upload
- Values, Stats, Features, Services, FAQ, Portfolio, Testimonials, Team, Clients: full CRUD pages
- Pricing: plans CRUD with per-plan sub-items management
- Settings: site-wide settings saved via UPSERT
- Messages: list, view, mark-as-read, delete contact submissions
- upload.php: standalone JSON image upload handler
- admin/assets/css/admin.css: dark sidebar Bootstrap 5 theme
- admin/assets/js/admin.js: sidebar toggle, image preview, delete confirm

Security: requireAuth() on all pages, CSRF on all POST forms,
PDO prepared statements throughout, htmlspecialchars() on all output,
password_hash()/password_verify() for admin authentication.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(ui): rebuild AI rows when toggling spectator mode

In spectator mode, player 1 becomes AI-controlled,
so the setup needs playerCount rows instead of

commit.message:
feat(ai): add custom AI personality builder

Add ability to create custom AI personalities with adjustable parameters:
- Min Advantage slider (-2 to +4)
- Max Attacks slider (1 to 10, or unlimited)
- Connectivity Bonus slider (0 to 5)

Includes named preset save/load/delete via localStorage, popup editor
in SetupScene, and full integration with GameScene player creation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(game): change Charge power-up from flat +3 bonus to +2 extra dice

Charge now adds 2 extra dice to the attacker's roll instead of a flat +3
to the total. This lets territories with 8 dice roll 10 dice on attack,
making Charge meaningfully powerful at high dice counts.

- Rename POWER_UP_BONUS to CHARGE_EXTRA_DICE (2) and SHIELD_DEFENSE_BONUS (3)
- Roll extra dice before summing instead of adding to total after
- Update AI advantage calculation to use +2 for charge
- Shield remains as flat +3 defender bonus (passive defense)
- Add new tests for extra dice rolling and power-up consumption
- Update GAME_LOGIC.md documentation
- Replace simulation seed 123 (stalemates under new balance)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

chore: mark phase-11 defect ticket as done

All 8 bugs fixed: seed degeneration, self-alliance,
duplicate elimination, dead alliance cleanup,
graph perf, surrender awareness, underdog logic,
undo alliance state. Plus undo config feature.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(game): make undo configurable in game setup

Gate undo functionality on undoEnabled config:
- Skip snapshot creation when undo is disabled
- Hide undo button and ignore Z key when disabled
- Remove undo shortcut from help overlay when disabled
- Add tests for undoEnabled persistence and validation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
